span.p:
Sensitive data in content?
API keys, passwords, SSNs,
credit cards, DB strings, IPs

span.p:
Rules 1-4: Sensitive data?
API keys, tokens, passwords,
employee IDs, IBANs, passports

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Rules 5-8: Attack patterns?
base64, prompt injection,
shell obfuscation, path traversal

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Rules 9-14: Exfiltration?
sensitive files, DB strings,
DNS exfil, pipe chains,
internal IPs, customer IDs

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Rule 15: Trusted endpoint?
localhost, GitHub, PyPI,
npm, crates.io, etc.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Rule 16: Network call?
curl, wget, ssh, requests,
httpx, fetch, AI SDKs
